Pinterest Resources and Best Practices (14 min)

Part of the "Alternate Platforms" module.

Pinterest Resources and Best Practices (14 min)

Alternate Platforms

In this video, you’ll learn how to create a Pinterest Ad Campaign. In order to use the conversions or catalog campaign types, you will need to

install the Pinterest Tag

and get a catalog set up prior to creating your campaign.

Consult the attached PDFs for Pinterest Creative Best Practices and Holiday Considerations for 2021.

You can also

check this link

for updated information on how to get started with Pinterest Advertising.

Mark As Complete
